nodes.title: Generate Animation HTML
widgets_values:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.animation import FuncAnimation

# number of points
N = 1000

# initial positions
points = np.random.randn(N, 2)

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
scat = ax.scatter(points[:, 0], points[:, 1], s=5)

ax.set_xlim(-5, 5)
ax.set_ylim(-5, 5)
ax.axis('off')
plt.subplots_adjust(left=0, right=1, top=1, bottom=0)
ax.set_position([0, 0, 1, 1])

fig.patch.set_facecolor('#111111')   # whole canvas
ax.set_facecolor('#111111')          # plotting area

def update(frame):
    global points
    # simple motion: random walk
    points += 0.01 * np.random.randn(N, 2)

    # update scatter positions
    scat.set_offsets(points)
    return scat,

ani = FuncAnimation(fig, update, frames=1000, interval=1)
from IPython.display import HTML
Result = HTML(ani.to_jshtml())
